core_doctrine: Conquer all Chinese territories. Transport troops from Japan to the Chinese coast every round. Attack every adjacent Chinese territory where force ratio is favorable. Compress China from all directions until eliminated.

strategic_plans.name: Conquer China
strategic_plans.reason: China is the sole objective. Every round must capture at least one Chinese territory. Use transports to continuously reinforce the mainland from Japan.
key_actions: Transport troops from Japan to coastal staging areas every round
Attack all adjacent Chinese territories with favorable force ratio
Push westward from the coast into the interior
Never leave troops idle on Japan when transports are available
strategic_plans.expected_outcome: Control 80%+ of Chinese territories and reduce Chinese army to near zero by round 6.

known_risks.description: Attacking with insufficient force ratio leads to losses without gaining territory
known_risks.mitigation: Only attack when ratio >= 1.5 or win rate >= 55%. Use aircraft to boost borderline attacks.

known_risks.description: Transport bottleneck: units stuck on Japan with too few transports
known_risks.mitigation: Maintain minimum 3 transports. Buy more if Japan stockpile exceeds 4 land units.
